title: Roblox
notes: To make Roblox work better for you, we deliver updates regularly. These updates include bug fixes and improvements for speed and reliability.

title: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
notes:
1. New Hero: Fallen Scarlet - Hirara: A geisha Assassin wielding Twin Fans: Ukifune, capable of combining them to unleash different combos.
2. S41 will start from 00:00:00 on 06/17 (Server Time). Complete Ranked matches to claim rewards including S41 Seasonal Skin: Zhask "Icespawn Scourge" and S41 Avatar Border "Scarlet Embers".

title: Free Fire: 9th Anniversary
notes:
[9th Anniversary] New 3D party lobby, themed rewards, and more ways to celebrate with friends!
[Themed BR] Factory becomes a limited-time anniversary venue. Anniversary quests, zone upgrades, and on-site revival await.
[Skill Boost] Some skills now feature new upgrade paths.
[Other Updates] BR-Ranked gets post-match review, BR areas get clearer loot indicators, and CS adds Perk Points.

title: Worms Zone .io — Hungry Snake
notes: Meet the updated Wardrobe! We've completely redesigned its look and introduced a rarity system for worms. Each worm now has its own rarity level, which determines how many boosters it starts a match with. We've also made room for new, even more beautiful worms. All coins spent on purchasing removed worms will be automatically refunded to your account.

title: EA SPORTS FC™ Football Mobile
notes:
Play The World’s Game update. Compete in a global football tournament and lead your national team to glory. Experience authentic player attributes with Playstyles that bring athletes' unique abilities to life.  Instantly connect with friends & play PVP in Quick Match. FC Mobile now supports Hindi, Czech & Polish The World’s Game Update also features a brand new nostalgia-themed soundtrack.

THE WORLD’S GAME TOURNAMENT 
Compete vs the world in The World’s Game international football tournament. C

title: Kingshot
notes:
[New Content]
1. New Feature: The Prestige Shop has been fully upgraded, and the brand-new Prestige Merit Shop is now available! The Ageless Voidstar Skin Series has been upgraded, with new rally skins and other deluxe skins added. After completing the Ageless Voidstar Puzzle, you can also obtain an exclusive domain effect and Prestige Pouch for an even more premium experience.
Successfully unlocking the Skin Series will trigger a server-wide announcement to showcase your extraordinary honor!

notes:

STORYLINE
Help Austin deal with the aftermath of a disaster and protect the Institute of Modern Butlers from accusations!

title: Gold and Glory
notes: Winter Wrath is live. Meet two new heroes, Ronin Okita and Oracle Isandra, and dive into winter-themed dungeon runs with seasonal rooms, traps, and limited-time events. Enjoy faster, more exciting battles with updated gameplay and balance improvements.

title: Subway Surfers
notes:
- Subway Surfers are heading back to sunny Sydney! Surf through beachside tracks, sparkling harbors and vibrant city streets, filled with fresh content and seasonal events.
- Meet Dan Under, the daring new Surfer with a love for animals and unlock themed outfits and Boards. 
- Join limited-time celebrations for Pride, Midsummer, 4th of July and get ready for the global football celebration with the Football Rush challenge.

title: PUBG MOBILE
notes:

Battle Royale
NARUTO Collaboration
1. Themed Mode: The Nine-Tails has invaded! Join forces with all players to battle the rampaging Nine-Tails and protect the Hidden Leaf.

3. Seven Ninjutsu: Pull off ninja highlights with Flying Raijin J
